calendar.matters:
Petn. Requesting Confirmation Of Property As Assets Of The Trust
Off Calendar Sep-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Schindler for Murice Tani.

Mr. Schindler stated that Isadore showed up in his office with a hand written document, that he had no information as to when Ruth died, that he never brought in the assets but that he signed a declaration of intent. In addition, he stated that Isadore did not understand community or seperate property, that he had put his Son's names on the bank accounts, that there was no mention of stocks and that he got back the original certificates. The Court ruled that the assets are to go into the living trust. The Court will review the order.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petn. Requesting Confirmation Of Property As Assets Of The Trust
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Continued To Sep-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
